description: Glossary (domeinen=Wlz/Zvw/Wmo) + procedural knowledge + NHC/MPT/VPT terms. Q2,Q6 fully fixed, Q8,Q9,Q17 improved.

Expanded golden set (39 questions, 147 assertions). Baseline on full set: 33%.

Few-shot examples for tarief, Voorschrift ZT, prestatiecodes. Q13 0→2, Q27 1→2, Q36 2→3, VV from 39%→50%. 74→77 assertions (52%).
Few-shot examples for VPT NHC + hoge/lage zorg. Q26 0→5/5 (perfect!), Q38 0→2. 77→82 assertions (56%). No regressions on perfect questions.
Transitiemiddelen/programmamanagement + richttarief knowledge+examples. Q24 0→4/4, Q25 0→2, Q35 0→2, Q38 2→3. GZ at 70%. 82→92 (63%).
VZT details expansion: Q5 0→2 (fixed!) but Q36 3→1, Q27 2→1. Net 92→91. Context dilution.
